history.message:
Agent1 Round 1: Syndrome X, also known as metabolic syndrome, refers to a cluster of conditions that occur together increasing the risk of heart disease, stroke, and diabetes. The characteristic features include central obesity, hypertension, dyslipidemia (abnormal levels of lipids in blood), and insulin resistance. Given these criteria, option A which describes prediabetic individuals who may have some but not all characteristics of Syndrome X fits best within this context.
